features: 【Enriched Inputs Selection】Unlimited inputs select from 4*SDI, 4*HDMI and USB-type C, NDI HX source and SD/SSD playback. Supports landscape and portrait for both inputs and outputs.
【Multiple Control Methods】Control your live event via GoStream built-in GUI & GoStream computer software (both for MAC and Win) & Bitfocus Companion.
【Rich Key Effects and Transitions】 Multisource, Luam Key, Chroma Key, Pattern Key, PIP, DSK. Transition with MIX, DIP, WIPE and T-Bar. Highly compatible live streaming methods: Up to 3 streaming
【Platforms at One Time】Streaming directly via Ethernet or Smart Phone hotspot(via USB cable). Or you can connect to all streaming software, like OBS, Vmix to streaming.

【Affordable Professional Streaming Solution】 A GoStream Duet equals a GoStream Deck + 4 HDMI & SDI converter + a FREE NDI HX LICENSE(need to download the latest firmware to unlock free NDI) as a gift.

Osee GoStream Duet Live Streaming Switcher Merchant video Previous page Next page Previous page Next page Previous page Next page 5 Video Input Channels Channel 1-4: HDMI/SDI auto-detection, configurable. Channel 5: NDI, UVC, internal video player selectable 3 Video Outputs HDMI OUT 1-2: Selected from 5 video input channels, multiview, PVW or PGM. USB 1: UVC Outputs up to 1080p30. 2 Audio Input MIC 1-2: 3.5mm Jack, MIC, MIC+power and Line configurable. 1 Audio Output PHONE: 3.5mm Jack, selected audio monitoring. Control Internal menu, software for PC or MAC, Stream Deck via companion plug-in. Direct Streaming Ethernet: 3 platforms simultaneous streaming, RTMP, up to 10Mb/s. Audio Mixer 2 Analog Inputs, 4 HDMI/SDI audio, 1 AUX audio. On/Off/AFV control, fader gain, balance, and delays control; 8 audio meter display. Multiview Monitoring PGM/PVW, 5 channel preview, STILL 1-2 with source label (UMD), tally, marker, audio meter, fade Level, audio on/off and AFV; Recording, playback and streaming status; Control Menu. Recording and Playback Internal recording and playback high-quality H.264 up to 70Mb/s while streaming. Internal SD card or external USB 2.0 SSD is supportted. Input video format 1280x720p 50/59.94/60,1920x1080p 23.98/24/25/29.97/30/50/59.94/60, 1920x1080i 50/59.94/60 Output video format 1920x1080p 23.98/24/25/29.97/30/50/59.94/60. Macro Up to 8 Macros can be accessed via panel, more via software. MultiSource 2 windows + 1 background, 4 pre-defined layout with modification. Other Effects Upstream Key: 1; DSK: 1; Chroma Key: 1, Luma Key: 1, Transition: 18 patterns; Color Generator: 5; Pattern Generator: 2; PIP: 1; Still Image: 2 generators, 32 storage with key and fill, PNG format. Environmental Power: 12V DC/14W; Item Weight: 560g; Shipping Weight: 1200g; Dimension (W×H×D): 252.4×49.3×107.3mm; Working Temperature: 5°C to 40°C (41°F~104°F).
